image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Lactate isn’t just waste; it’s a key player in our bodies.
Context visual: For years, scientists viewed lactate as a byproduct of exercise. But new research is challenging that idea.
Escalation visual: Lactate actually fuels our muscles and brain, helping us adapt and recover.
Evidence visual: Studies show that lactate can improve endurance and even enhance cognitive function. It’s not just a waste product!
Payoff visual: So next time you hear ‘lactic acid’, remember it’s more of a fuel than a waste.
Cta visual: Curious about more science myths? Follow for more insights!
